message:
fix(ui): prevent panic on short hash strings in buildSnapshot logging

ComputeDataHash() returns "empty" (5 chars) for zero issues, but the
logging code used hash[:16] which would panic with slice bounds out
of range. Added hashPrefix() helper to safely truncate long hashes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
